rule.full_text:
NestedIf(x:,
         result: (if x > 5 then (if x > 8 then "high" else "mid") else "low")) :-
  Numbers(x)

expression.expression_heritage: if x > 5 then (if x > 8 then "high" else "mid") else "low"

rule.full_text:
CompareChain(x:, y:) :-
  Numbers(x), Numbers(y),
  x > 0, y > 0,
  x < y, y < 8,
  x != y

RecordAccess(name:, inner_a:) :-
  Records(data:),
  name == data.name,
  inner_a == data.value.a
